evals.prompt:
Use the model-incorporation-code skill to integrate a new ML model into an Ersilia template.

--template ~/github/external_repos/eos2r5a
--source ~/github/external_repos/RAscore
evals.expected_output: main.py runs without error; run_columns.csv has column ra_score (float, high); checkpoints contain XGB model files; install.yml has all deps pinned; run_output.csv produced by actually running the model

evals.prompt:
